scripts.build: npm run build:html && npm run build:pdf
scripts.build:editorial: resume export public/editorial-minimal/index.html --theme ./themes/editorial-minimal && resume export public/editorial-minimal/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/editorial-minimal
scripts.build:terminal: resume export public/terminal/index.html --theme ./themes/terminal && resume export public/terminal/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/terminal
scripts.build:infographic: resume export public/infographic/index.html --theme ./themes/infographic && resume export public/infographic/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/infographic
scripts.build:glassmorphism: resume export public/glassmorphism/index.html --theme ./themes/glassmorphism && resume export public/glassmorphism/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/glassmorphism
scripts.build:press: resume export public/press/index.html --theme ./themes/press && resume export public/press/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/press
scripts.build:compact: resume export public/compact/index.html --theme ./themes/compact && resume export public/compact/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/compact
scripts.build:swiss: resume export public/swiss/index.html --theme ./themes/swiss && resume export public/swiss/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/swiss
scripts.build:warm: resume export public/warm/index.html --theme ./themes/warm && resume export public/warm/resume.pdf --theme ./themes/warm
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:editorial && npm run build:terminal && npm run build:infographic && npm run build:glassmorphism && npm run build:press && npm run build:compact && npm run build:swiss && npm run build:warm
